caption: The video captures a nighttime scene at an empty stadium, focusing on a camera suspended by cables high above the seating area. The camera is positioned centrally in the frame, hanging against a dark sky, with its cables forming a triangular shape as they extend upwards and outwards. Below, rows of red seats are neatly arranged, creating a stark contrast with the blackness of the night. A few illuminated signs, including one that reads "IDEAL," are visible along the lower edge of the seating area, adding a touch of color to the otherwise monochromatic setting. The overall atmosphere is quiet and still, suggesting a moment of preparation or anticipation before an event.
